name: ay-iptv-player
description: IPTV Player for WebOS LG TV

scripts.build: npm run clean && vite build && npm run copy:webos
scripts.copy:webos: cp webos/appinfo.json dist/ && cp webos/icon.png dist/ && cp webos/largeIcon.png dist/ && cp webos/splashBackground.png dist/
scripts.package: npm run build && ares-package dist/ -o output/ --no-minify
scripts.deploy: npm run package && npm run install:tv && npm run launch
scripts.redeploy: npm run close && npm run deploy
